creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
My buddy had the same problem with 'node' package on 11.1.

Copying the /usr/lib/libdl.so.1 from FreeBSD 11.2 system to that 11.1 system into the same /usr/lib/libdl.so.1 place helped.

Its VERY unsupported solution so its better upgrade then do that but when really fast (not best) solution is needed - then it works too.

Regards,
vermaden
